name: Quantum Coherence Heartbeat & Preopen Monitor — QTP-AFTO

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*)::int FROM quantum.logging_dead_letter WHERE failed_at >= now() - interval '24 hours') AS dead_letters,
  (SELECT count(*)::int FROM quantum.strategy_signals WHERE signal_ts >= date_trunc('day', now())) AS scanner_signals,
  (SELECT count(*)::int FROM quantum.vc_shadow_score_observations WHERE observed_at >= date_trunc('day', now())) AS vc_obs_today;

meta.note: DR export of ACTIVE/published version 9c2bc8fd (QTP_AFTO_SUPABASE_PORT_v4.3.2: NYSE holiday/weekend guard + after-hours zero-signal suppression). Telegram chat id redacted to REDACTED_CHAT_ID.
